Name: Joltik
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

Name: Galvantula

Name: Rowlet
Effects: Draw a card.

Effects: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the United Wings attack.

Name: Houndoom
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do 100 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Horsea
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

Name: Seadra
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Kingdra ex
Effects: Put up to 3 [W] Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench.
This attack does 50 more damage for each [W] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

Name: Sneasel
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

Name: Weavile
Effects: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Effects: If you have at least 3 [D] Energy in play, this attack does 50 more damage.

Effects: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

Name: Malamar
